name: security-analysis-sixth-edition
description: Benjamin Graham and David Dodd's 'Security Analysis: Sixth Edition, Foreword by Warren Buffett' — the definitive text on value investing, updated for the 21st century. Covers the margin of safety, intrinsic value, discrepancies between price and value, stock-option warrants, management compensation, relative value analysis, and the 'Great Illusion of the Stock Market.'
useCase: Understanding value investing fundamentals, learning the margin of safety concept, performing security analysis, evaluating management compensation, identifying price-value discrepancies, and avoiding the Great Illusion of the stock market.
knownRisks: Dense, academic text — not a quick read
The Sixth Edition includes modern commentary alongside original text
Requires basic financial literacy to fully understand
